layer_order_diagnosis.finding: docs/setup-uipath.md records Document Understanding as enabled or reachable.
uip --help and uip tools list do not list an ixp command prefix in CLI 1.195.1.

project_discovery_result.blocker: The installed uip CLI does not expose the ixp command, so no IXP project list could be obtained. This is a registration/tool-surface blocker, not an IXP project permission finding.

activation_next_steps: Update/install a UiPath CLI build or plugin that exposes uip ixp, then rerun uip tools list --output json.
Rerun uip ixp projects list --output json as read-only discovery.
If projects are listed, verify a synthetic Treatment Access project or create one only after explicit approval.
Bind the published IXP/DU model into Maestro/Agent Builder and keep fallback_parser output schema as the compatibility contract.
